Class IsabelleResult

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.isabelletranslation.automation.IsabelleResult
public class IsabelleResult extends Object
This class stores the result of a IsabelleSolver. This includes computation times and in some cases successful tactics and exceptions.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Description

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns a String description of the type of this result.

    • getTimeoutResult

      public static IsabelleResult getTimeoutResult(Duration computationTime)
      Creates a timeout result.
      Parameters:
      computationTime - the time taken for timeout to occur
      Returns:
      Isabelle result representing a timeout

    • getErrorResult

      public static IsabelleResult getErrorResult(Exception exception)
      Returns an error result
      Parameters:
      exception - the exception that caused computation to fail
      Returns:
      Isabelle result representing an error

    • getSuccessResult

      public static IsabelleResult getSuccessResult(String successfulTactic, Duration computationTime)
      Creates a successful result
      Parameters:
      successfulTactic - the successful tactic found by a solver
      computationTime - time taken for proof search
      Returns:
      Isabelle result representing a success

    • getInterruptedResult

      public static IsabelleResult getInterruptedResult()
      Creates an interrupt result
      Returns:
      Isabelle result representing an Interrupt

    • getUnknownResult

      public static IsabelleResult getUnknownResult()
      Creates an unknown result
      Returns:
      Isabelle result representing an unknown result

    • isSuccessful

      public boolean isSuccessful()
      Is this result successful?
      Returns:
      true - if successful, false - otherwise

    • isError

      public boolean isError()
      Is this an error result?
      Returns:
      true - if error, false - otherwise

    • isTimeout

      public boolean isTimeout()
      Is this a timeout result?
      Returns:
      true - if timeout, false - otherwise
